message:
feat(core/iconv): add codec dispatch taxonomy, phase-1 lookup table, and deterministic fallback policies

Extend the iconv core module with structured codec routing infrastructure:

- Add CodecDispatchPath enum (IncludedCanonical, IncludedAlias,
  ExcludedFamily, UnsupportedCodec) for classifying codec lookup
  results in the phase-1 runtime table.

- Add IconvFallbackPolicy enum (ExcludedCodecFamily, UnsupportedCodec)
  with as_str() for deterministic error reporting when iconv_open
  cannot route a codec pair.

- Add IconvDispatchMetadata struct capturing to/from codec names and
  their dispatch paths for telemetry and debugging.

- Add IconvOpenError struct combining fallback policy with dispatch
  metadata for detailed failure contracts.

- Introduce PHASE1_CODEC_TABLE (4 entries: UTF-8, ISO-8859-1,
  UTF-16LE, UTF-32) and EXCLUDED_CODEC_TABLE (6 entries: SHIFT_JIS,
  EUC-JP, BIG5, GB2312, GB18030, EUC-KR) with canonical names,
  normalized forms, and alias lists.

- Add normalize_codec_name() helper for case-insensitive, dash/
  underscore-stripped codec matching.

- Add classify_codec() returning (CodecDispatchPath, encoding-option,
  canonical-name) and resolve_iconv_open() returning structured
  Result<(Encoding, Encoding), IconvOpenError>.

- Refactor parse_encoding() to use the new structured codec table
  lookup instead of ad-hoc string matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
